name: Genusplus Group Ltd
analysis: GNP has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$9.9977. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$10.1260 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$9.9977, stop A$9.2466, target A$10.4100. Risk/reward is 0.55:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
